name: python3-libqcow
title: python3-libqcow
summary: QEMU Copy-On-Write image format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
QEMU Copy-On-Write image format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libqcow is a library to access the QEMU Copy-On-Write (QCOW) image format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libqcow.
